title: Not Enough Fakepixel
description: The first all in one mod made fully for fakepixel from scratch
body:
# Welcome Fakepixel players!

This mod is the first all-in-one mod made for fakepixel skyblock from scratch. Multiple game modifications are present to enhance your gameplay!

### Privacy disclaimer and data collection [PRIVACY](https://github.com/davidbelesp/NotEnoughFakepixel/edit/master/PRIVACY.md)

# Features

### Quality of life
- General
  - Alerts
  - Aliases
  - Disable block breaking particles
  - Always sprint
  - Copy chat message
  - Full block lever
  - Block placing items
  - Show unclaimed Jacob rewards
  - Fairy soul waypoints
  - Spider's den relic waypoints
  - Etherwarp overlay
  - Etherwarp sounds
  - Hide flaming fists
  - Hide player armor
  - Hide dead mobs
  - Hide falling blocks
  - Item animations
  - Smol people
  - Reforge helper
  - Disable Hyperion Explosions
  - Disable Thunderlord enchantment bolts
  - No Hurt camera animation
  - Golden enchants
  - Fullbright
  - Disable Potion Effects in inventory
  - Show current pet in pet menu
  - Storage overlay
  - Equipment overlay
  - Slot locking & binding
  - Middle click on Menus
  - Scrollable tooltips
  - Disable sounds from Jerry-chine gun and AOTE
  - Midas Staff minimal animation and sounds
  - Wardrobe key shortcut
  - Equipment key shortcut
  - Hide players near NPCS **(NEW)**
- Chat
  - Disable Friend > joined messages
  - Disable Info & Watchdog messages
  - Disable selling ranks messages

### Farming
- 1.12 Crop height

### Fishing
- Fishing countdown **(FIX)**
- Fishing notifier for Legendary Sea Creatures
- Notifier for Trophy Fishing

### Dungeons
- General
  - Custom Leap GUI
  - Custom Terminal GUI
  - Prevent Salvaging Legendary & Epic 
  - Blood ready title
  - Boulder Solver
  - Silverfish Solver
  - Wither doors highlight
  - Teleport maze Solver
  - Terminal waypoints
  - Custom S+ message
  - Spirit bow tracer
  - Dungeon Map
  - Three Weirdos Solver
  - Auto Ready
  - Auto close secret chests
  - "Unable to locate sign" hidden
  - S+ reminder
  - Score overlay
  - Secret overlay
- Starred mobs
  - Starred mob display
  - Fel position display
  - Bat position display
- Floor 7
  - Terminal solvers
  - Terminal tracker
  - Box withers
- Master Mode 7
  - M7 dragon highlight
  - M7 relic waypoints
### Mining
- General
  - Drill Animation Reset FIX
  - Mining Ability ready notifier
  - Dwarven waypoints
- Mining Overlay
  - Drill Fuel Overlay **(FIX)**
  - Mining Ability cooldown Overlay **(FIX)**
  - Commissions Overlay **(FIX)**
  - Mithril Powder Overlay
  - Puzzler NPC Solver
- Crystal Hollows **(NEW)**
  - Crystal Hollows Map **(NEW)**
  - CH Waypoints **(NEW)**
  - Full block Crystal Panes **(NEW)**
  - Mining overlay for CH **(NEW)**
  - Scavenged Tools Overlay **(NEW)**
  - Precursor Items Overlay **(NEW)**
  - Treasure chest Notifier **(NEW)**
  - Worm/Scatha Notifier **(NEW)**
  - Metal Detector Guesser **(NEW)**
  - Automaton Display **(NEW)**
 
### Experimentation Table
- Chronomatron solver **(FIX)**
- Ultrasequencer solver
- Prevent missclicks

### Chocolate Factory
- Show best rabbit in Chocolate Factory
- Hoppity's hunt eggs waypoints

### Crimson Isle
- Bosses notifier
- Ashfang helper & overlay

### Diana
- Burrow guess
- Warp keybind
- Burrow waypoints
- Gaia construct helper
- Syamese Lynx helper
- Minos Inquisitor party chat & waypoint
- Inquisitor Outline
- Some QOL features

### Slayers
- Voidgloom Seraph beacon waypoint **(FIX)** 
- Miniboss spawn alert
- Slayer health display
- Slayer boss time
- Blaze pillar title
- Blaze attunements
